zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus於1487年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親Sir George Douglas Master of Angus18歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus15歲。她於1505年與Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1576年3月26日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特吉福德享年89歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus于1487年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲Sir George Douglas Master of Angus18岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus15岁。她于1505年与Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1576年3月26日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特吉福德享年89岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus was born in 1487, in Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Sir George Douglas Master of Angus, was 18 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus, was 15. She married Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester in 1505, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 March 1576, in Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus est née en 1487, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir George Douglas Master of Angus, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester en 1505, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1576, à Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus 1487 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Douglas Master of Angus 18 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus 15. Sie hat 1505 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. März 1576 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester nel 1505, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Douglas of  Angusが1487年にスコットランドミドロスアンで生まれた時，父Sir George Douglas Master of Angusは18歳，母Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angusは15歳であった。1505年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでSir John Hay -III Lord Yesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1576年3月26日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンイエスターギフォードで89歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターギフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus(이)가 1487년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Douglas Master of Angus(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1505년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1576년 3월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 지퍼드에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 지퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester em 1505, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Douglas of  Angus родилась в 1487 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir George Douglas Master of Angus было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester в 1505 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 марта 1576 г. в местности гиффорд, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности гиффорд, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Sir John Hay -III Lord Yester en 1505, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
